nodes.name: Daily 8am Israel
nodes.notes: Note: n8n uses the server TZ. If your Pi is on UTC, change cron to 0 5 * * * (summer) or 0 6 * * * (winter), or set TZ=Asia/Jerusalem in n8n env.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `query { boards(ids: 5093821351) { groups(ids: "new_group29179") { items_page(limit: 200) { items { id name column_values(ids: ["project_status", "date", "priority"]) { id text value } } } } } }` }) }}
